title: NIMHANS Senior Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS)
short_info: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences has released the official notification for 1 Senior Scientific Officer (Neuromuscular) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D (Basic / Medical Sciences), One-year experience in Neuromuscular Diseases / Neurosciences
qualification.details: Ph.D (Basic / Medical Sciences) with One-year experience in Neuromuscular Diseases / Neurosciences

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.nimhans.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
